title: ctenitis flexuosa
intro: Ctenitis flexuosa, also known as the flexible fern, is a type of fern plant that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis flexuosa include reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating pain, among others. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
